name: Lebanese Fresh Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: Apple or Pear or Strawberries (depending on season)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the melon from its rind and dice it.
2. Cut the pineapple into chunks.
3. Peel the oranges and section them, removing all of the white membrane. Snip into chunks with kitchen shears.
4. Toss the fruit together. If the fruit is nice and ripe, the natural juices will provide plenty of sweetness, so no sugar will be needed.
5. Dice the apple or pear.
6. If using berries, wash and hull them.
7. Add the diced apple/pear and berries to the fruit mixture.
8. Just before serving, peel, slice, and add the bananas. Mix well.
